channel.title: I have created a unofficial telegram frontity group for help
channel.description: please if there is already any telegram group please inform me or Join @FrontityHelp In Telegram

item.title: I have created a unofficial telegram frontity group for help
item.dc:creator: Johan
item.description:
I would also suggest Discord or Slack as a better solution for quick(er) one-on-one support, although these forums do there job very well and is easy and well managed.

Read full topic
item.source: I have created a unofficial telegram frontity group for help

item.title: I have created a unofficial telegram frontity group for help
item.dc:creator: codemonkeynorth
item.description:
thanks. haven’t really used Telegram. I wonder if discord might be a better feature wise? presumably can be split into different channels as well

Read full topic
item.source: I have created a unofficial telegram frontity group for help
